cta.createVariantTitle: Adapt this blueprint for another place or language

list.heading: Start from a proven pattern.
list.intro: Blueprints are tested project recipes — born in one place, adapted for others. Pick a model that fits your context, your country and your language; we'll set the rest up around it.
list.showing: Showing {shown} of {total, plural, one {# blueprint} other {# blueprints}}

empty.title: No blueprints match.
empty.body: Loosen a filter, or save the first blueprint that fits this niche yourself.

card.originalRecipe: The original recipe — adapt it for your area.

detail.stepsHeading: {count, plural, one {# step} other {# steps}} to deliver this.
detail.noSteps: This blueprint has no steps yet.

basics.title: What is this blueprint?
basics.desc: Two sentences are enough to describe the pattern. You can add more detail later.
basics.descriptionHelp: The first paragraph is what shows up on the blueprint card.
basics.descriptionPlaceholder: What problem does this pattern solve, and what does running it look like?

locale.title: Where and in what language?
locale.desc: Forks of this blueprint inherit these tags by default. Variants must declare at least one of country or language.
locale.countryLabel: Country (optional unless this is a variant)
locale.languageLabel: Working language (optional unless this is a variant)
locale.familyHelpVariant: This blueprint is currently a variant of the family below. Set to “Standalone” to promote it to a root.
locale.familyHelpRoot: Optional. If you’re adapting an existing pattern, link to the original root so the two appear together as a family.
locale.hasVariantsNotice: This blueprint already has {count, plural, one {# variant} other {# variants}} of its own, so it stays a family root.

steps.title: Steps to deliver the pattern.
steps.desc: Anyone who forks this blueprint will start with these steps. Edit, reorder, or remove as needed.
